listings.name: The Mill House Cafe
listings.blurb: Small-batch coffee and all-day breakfast in a restored grain mill.

listings.name: Mill House Inn
listings.blurb: Eight-room boutique inn near the river walk. Note: similar name to The Mill House Cafe but a separate business.

listings.name: Pancho's Fire Grill
listings.blurb: Mesquite-grilled tacos and a big shaded patio.

listings.name: Harborlight Oyster Bar
listings.blurb: Raw bar and local catch with a sunset view over the harbor.

listings.name: Red Cedar Trailhead
listings.blurb: Six miles of marked trails through old-growth cedar.

listings.name: Vernon County Heritage Museum
listings.blurb: Local maritime and farming history across two floors.

listings.name: Starfall Observatory
listings.blurb: Public telescope nights, spring through fall only.

listings.name: Ridgeway Pines Campground
listings.blurb: Tent and RV sites with lake access.

listings.name: The Vernon Grand Hotel
listings.blurb: Historic full-service hotel with a spa and conference space.

listings.name: The Old Cannery Event Hall
listings.blurb: Restored cannery with capacity for 200, popular for weddings.

listings.name: Brookline Community Barn
listings.blurb: Rustic barn venue for up to 120 guests.

listings.name: Tandoor & Vine
listings.blurb: Modern Indian plates and a small natural-wine list.

listings.name: Cape Vernon Lighthouse
listings.blurb: Climb the 1888 lighthouse for harbor views.

listings.name: Brookline Riverside Motel
listings.blurb: Simple riverside rooms within walking distance of downtown.

listings.name: The Coal Yard BBQ
listings.blurb: Slow-smoked brisket and ribs by the pound.

listings.name: Harbor Kayak Rentals
listings.blurb: Hourly kayak and paddleboard rentals on the bay.
